detectors.description:

	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (ELONAJA.sol#577)

	- ELONAJA._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ELONAJA.sol#347-425)
	- ELONAJA.initPair() (ELONAJA.sol#555-567)
	- ELONAJA.startTrade() (ELONAJA.sol#571-591)
